calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Determine Value Of Real Property; To Determine The Fair Market Rental Value Of The Trust Property That Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan Has Been Residing In; To Order That The Remaining Trust Assets Be Distributed In Accordance With The Terms Of The Trust; To Compel Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan To Provide Information Concerning A Discrepancy Regarding A Prior Distribution
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions To Determine Value Of Real Property; To Determine The Fair Market Rental Value Of The Trust Property That Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan Has Been Residing In; To Order That The Remaining Trust Assets Be Distributed In Accordance With The Terms Of The Trust; To Compel Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan To Provide Information Concerning A Discrepancy Regarding A Prior Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Continued To May-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne for Gary Chan (Petitioner) and Specially Appearing for Vance Chang

Mr. Byrne stated they are working on a settlement, all issues are resolved, they are going to sell the property and there is $4,000 credit issue. Mr. Byrne also stated the settlement will not be contemplating court approval and requested one more continuance. The Petition for Instruction to Determine Value of Real Property, etc. is continued to May 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for one last continuance. If the matter is not settled, the parties are to have met and conferred as to how to get this matter to conclusion.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions To Determine Value Of Real Property; To Determine The Fair Market Rental Value Of The Trust Property That Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan Has Been Residing In; To Order That The Remaining Trust Assets Be Distributed In Accordance With The Terms Of The Trust; To Compel Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan To Provide Information Concerning A Discrepancy Regarding A Prior Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Continued To Mar-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne for petitioner Gary Chan; Vance Chang for Terry Chan.

Mr. Byrne informed the Court that the parties were now close to concluding a settlement agreement, under which the parties would put the property up for sale and split the sales proceeds. Mr. Chang agreed that the matter was moving toward resolution, and suggested continuing the matter in hopes of getting the matter resolved. The matter was continued to March 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

Petition For Instructions To Determine Value Of Real Property; To Determine The Fair Market Rental Value Of The Trust Property That Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan Has Been Residing In; To Order That The Remaining Trust Assets Be Distributed In Accordance With The Terms Of The Trust; To Compel Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan To Provide Information Concerning A Discrepancy Regarding A Prior Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vance Chang for Terry Chan (Co-Trustee).

The matter was called, passed and re-called at 9:18 a.m. The Court noted that Mr. Byrne is not present. Mr. Chang stated that they tried mediation in July, that it was unsuccessful, that he has conducted some written discovery and that he notified Mr. Byrne that he feels the accounting is insufficient. Mr. Chang also stated that Mr. Byrne may want to propound discovery, that they have been playing phone tag, and that they tried to meet and confer last month, but it did not happen. The Petition for Instructions to Determine Value of Real Property, etc. is continued to February 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the parties to be ready to move forward and a joint statement no later than January 23, 2018 as to what is required to get to an evidentiary hearing and what the evidentiary hearing will look like. Mr. Chang is to advise Mr. Byrne.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions To Determine Value Of Real Property; To Determine The Fair Market Rental Value Of The Trust Property That Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan Has Been Residing In; To Order That The Remaining Trust Assets Be Distributed In Accordance With The Terms Of The Trust; To Compel Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan To Provide Information Concerning A Discrepancy Regarding A Prior Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-26-2017 Continued To Nov-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Byrne for Gary Chan (Petitioner).
Robert Yang for Terry Chan (Respondent).

Mr. Byrne stated that he spoke with Vance Chang yesterday, that he provided settlement papers to Mr. Chang 60-days ago, that he received a stack of discovery requests two weeks ago, that Mr. Chang thinks settlement will go forward and that they picked a date of November 28th to consummate the settlement. The Petition for Instructions to Determine Value of Real Property, etc. is continued to November 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the parties to be prepared to address the Court and explain how this is going to move forward.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions To Determine Value Of Real Property; To Determine The Fair Market Rental Value Of The Trust Property That Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan Has Been Residing In; To Order That The Remaining Trust Assets Be Distributed In Accordance With The Terms Of The Trust; To Compel Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan To Provide Information Concerning A Discrepancy Regarding A Prior Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-08-2017 Continued To Sep-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions To Determine Value Of Real Property; To Determine The Fair Market Rental Value Of The Trust Property That Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan Has Been Residing In; To Order That The Remaining Trust Assets Be Distributed In Accordance With The Terms Of The Trust; To Compel Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan To Provide Information Concerning A Discrepancy Regarding A Prior Distribution
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Continued To Aug-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Byrne for Gary Chan.
Vance Chang for Terry Chan (Respondent).

Mr. Byrne stated that he would participate in going back to the table, that he has been working on settling this matter for some time, that Terry takes the position that he will not consider current valuation and that Terry has been living in the house rent free for several years. Mr. Chang stated that $200,000.00 is ready to be distributed. The Court encouraged the parties to reach accommodations to preserve the property for themselves and asked if they wanted to do mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 25, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by August 1, 2017. The Petition for Instructions to Determine Value of Real Property, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on August 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. If the matter is not resolved, they are to meet and confer as to how the case is to move forward.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions To Determine Value Of Real Property; To Determine The Fair Market Rental Value Of The Trust Property That Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan Has Been Residing In; To Order That The Remaining Trust Assets Be Distributed In Accordance With The Terms Of The Trust; To Compel Successor Co-Trustee Terry Z. Chan To Provide Information Concerning A Discrepancy Regarding A Prior Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Continued To May-09-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustees And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for Gary Chan and Terry Chan (Petitioners). Ernest Der for Jeannie Law (Objector).

Mr. Der spoke about mistrust of the Family, the issue of distribution of gifts from date of death, stated that there should be adequate funds to make distribution and that there was alot of concern from his Client about the way the Trust is being administered. The Court finds that the Santiago Street property is an asset of the Trust. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustees And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-09-2011 Continued To Mar-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
